headline: Human Brains Encode Multiple Speech Streams Simultaneously
lede: New research into auditory processing reveals that the human brain manages multitasking through overlapping neural representations. The study demonstrates that we begin encoding new information before fully disengaging from current focus.

headline: Kimi K3 Enters the Frontier with 2.8 Trillion Parameters
lede: The latest open-weights model introduces a massive sparse architecture designed for complex agentic workflows. It marks a shift toward accessible, high-performance computing in the open-source ecosystem.

headline: RePebble Ecosystem Matures with New Hardware Production
lede: The project continues to revive legacy wearables through community-led software improvements and persistent hardware manufacturing efforts. New iterations signal a commitment to maintaining device longevity despite initial technical hurdles.

headline: Ancient Roman Concrete Secrets Offer Modern Durability Lessons
lede: Researchers have identified chemical carbonation as the mechanism behind the remarkable endurance of Roman infrastructure. This process of self-healing suggests a blueprint for sustainable, long-lasting construction.
pullquote: The key to building for the next millennium lies in the chemical wisdom of ancient masonry.

headline: Microsoft Releases Source Code for Iconic Comic Chat
lede: The 1996 IRC client that famously introduced Comic Sans is now available for public inspection. This release preserves a unique experiment in early visual communication and character expression.

headline: Decoy Font Obscures Text from AI Scrapers
lede: This hybrid typeface uses layered frequencies to create a visual illusion that confuses machine vision. It serves as a creative exploration of typography at the intersection of human privacy and automated indexing.

headline: Mastering USB-C Power Delivery and Complex Signaling
lede: Navigating the multi-layered standards of modern connectivity requires careful attention to pinout and power negotiation. This technical guide outlines the requirements for implementing reliable high-power charging systems.

headline: LM Studio Bionic Bridges Local Models and Secure Workflows
lede: The Bionic platform integrates open-source models with private, sandboxed file manipulation for developers. It offers a secure, controlled interface for those seeking alternatives to proprietary AI clouds.

headline: The Forgotten 1984 Multiuser System Named Starlink
lede: Long before the modern satellite network, another Starlink failed in its attempt to modernize the IBM PC workstation environment. The project remains a brief footnote in the history of local area computing.

headline: Solod Project Transpiles Go into Readable C11 Code
lede: By subsetting Go syntax, this tool provides a path to systems-level programming without a heavy runtime or garbage collector. It aims to bridge safety and performance in resource-constrained environments.
